product_source.note: Dual-service paper: covers both BDSBAS (SBAS) and PPP-B2b. Core=True is justified because substantial PPP-B2b technical content included.

grounding_quotes.quote_text:
Since both the BDSBAS and PPP-B2b utilize a ground monitoring station network 
to determine the satellite orbits and clock offset corrections, and broadcast differential corrections through the three 
Geostationary Orbit (GEO) satellites of BDS-3, the feasibility of the co-construction of BDSBAS and PPP-B2b is analyzed, 
strategies for the infrastructure sharing and correction broadcasting are presented, and the influences of BDSBAS 
correction broadcasting strategy adjustment are evaluated.
grounding_quotes.original_quote: PPP through B2b signals of Geostationary Orbit (GEO) satellites (PPP-B2b)

grounding_quotes.quote_text:
Satellite Navigation             (2022) 3:5  
https://doi.org/10.1186/s43020-022-00066-2
ORIGINAL ARTICLE
Principle and performance of BDSBAS 
and PPP‑B2b of BDS‑3
Yuanxi Yang1,2*  , Qun Ding3, Weiguang Gao4, Jinlong Li5, Yangyin Xu1,2 and Bijiao Sun1,2 
Abstract 
Within the framework of differential augmentation, this paper introduces the basic technical framework and per-
formance of the BeiDou Global Navigation Satellite System (BDS-3) Satellite-Based Augmentation System (BDSBAS), 
including orbit products, satellite clock offset products, ionosphere and its integrity performance.
grounding_quotes.original_quote: The basic principle of BDS-3 Precise Point Positioning (PPP-B2b) is expounded

experiment_epoch.note: This is a system overview/principle paper by BDS chief designer Yuanxi Yang. No specific experiment epoch — describes system design and initial performance.

dcb_handling.note: Overview paper describes PPP-B2b at system level. DCB is part of PPP-B2b service but not specifically discussed in the text.

key_concepts: Co-construction feasibility of BDSBAS and PPP-B2b

https://doi.org/10.1186/s43020-022-00066-2
ORIGINAL ARTICLE
Principle and performance of BDSBAS 
and PPP‑B2b of BDS‑3
Yuanxi Yang1,2*  , Qun Ding3, Weiguang Gao4, Jinlong Li5, Yangyin Xu1,2 and Bijiao Sun1,2 
Abstract 
Within the framework of differential augmentation, this paper introduces the basic technical framework and per-
formance of the BeiDou Global Navigation Satellite System (BDS-3) Satellite-Based Augmentation System (BDSBAS), 
including orbit products, satellite clock offset products, ionosphere and its integrity performance.
grounding_quotes.original_quote: Within the framework of differential augmentation, this paper introduces the basic technical framework and performance

datasets.note: System overview paper — does not describe specific experimental datasets

metrics.description: Paper describes performance qualitatively: orbit and clock offset accuracy, ionosphere integrity, positioning accuracy, convergence time. Specific quantitative values limited in the accessible text.

main_results.summary: BDSBAS provides integrity-assured corrections for aviation; PPP-B2b enables real-time PPP with high accuracy (cm-level) after convergence. Co-construction of BDSBAS and PPP-B2b is feasible with infrastructure sharing.
key_findings: BDSBAS and PPP-B2b share ground monitoring station network and GEO broadcast satellites
Co-construction of BDSBAS and PPP-B2b is feasible
PPP-B2b provides cm-level static and dm-level kinematic positioning
IGSO satellites could also broadcast differential corrections

grounding_quotes.quote_text:
Since both the BDSBAS and PPP-B2b utilize a ground monitoring station network 
to determine the satellite orbits and clock offset corrections, and broadcast differential corrections through the three 
Geostationary Orbit (GEO) satellites of BDS-3, the feasibility of the co-construction of BDSBAS and PPP-B2b is analyzed, 
strategies for the infrastructure sharing and correction broadcasting are presented, and the influences of BDSBAS 
correction broadcasting strategy adjustment are evaluated.
grounding_quotes.original_quote: the feasibility of the co-construction of BDSBAS and PPP-B2b is analyzed, strategies for the infrastructure sharing and correction broadcasting are presented

novelty_audit.rationale: Authored by BDS chief designer Yuanxi Yang. Authoritative system-level overview of BDSBAS and PPP-B2b design principles. Explains the engineering framework rather than introducing novel algorithms. High reference value for understanding BDS-3 augmentation architecture.

grounding_quotes.quote_text:
The basic principle 
of BDS-3 Precise Point Positioning (PPP-B2b) is expounded, the similarities and differences between the PPP service 
provided by BDS-3 and International Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) Service (IGS) are discussed, and the 
limitations of PPP-B2b are analyzed.
grounding_quotes.original_quote: the basic principle of BDS-3 Precise Point Positioning (PPP-B2b) is expounded, the similarities and differences between the PPP service provided by BDS-3 and IGS are discussed

reproduction_blockers: System-level overview paper — no experiment to reproduce
BDSBAS/PPP-B2b ground infrastructure not publicly accessible
GEO satellite broadcast correction stream not publicly archived
No source code or algorithms described in reproducible detail
